job_title: Sr Data Scientist, Fraud Risk Oversight
job_nlp_title: Sr Data Scientist, Fraud Risk Oversight
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Data Science, Fraud Risk Assessment, Fraud Typologies, Risk Management Frameworks, Python
skill_match_scores: Data Science:1.0, Fraud Risk Assessment:0.0, Fraud Typologies:0.0, Risk Management Frameworks:0.0, Python:1.0
must_have_quals: 3+ years relevant experience and a Bachelor's degree OR Any equivalent combination of education and experience, Advanced proficiency in Python and SQL for extracting insights from large-scale datasets, Skilled in using tools like Tableau, Looker, Power BI, or Python libraries (Seaborn, Plotly) to present complex findings to non-technical stakeholders, Deep understanding of fraud typologies (e.g., account takeover, payment fraud, synthetic identity) and risk management frameworks
preferred_quals: Critically evaluate the effectiveness of fraud strategies developed by the First Line of Defense, Perform deep-dive analytics on transactional, Identity data to identify emerging fraud patterns and vulnerabilities that the first line fraud may have missed, Act as a subject matter expert (SME) to advise senior leadership on the technical and business value of proposed risk controls
core_responsibilities: Lead the development and implementation of advanced data science models, Collaborate with stakeholders to understand requirements, Drive best practices in data science, Ensure data quality and integrity in all processes, Mentor and guide junior data scientists, Stay updated with the latest trends in data science, Critically evaluate the effectiveness of fraud strategies developed by the First Line of Defense, Perform deep-dive analytics on transactional, Identity data to identify emerging fraud patterns and vulnerabilities that the first line fraud may have missed, Act as a subject matter expert (SME) to advise senior leadership on the technical and business value of proposed risk controls
job_summary: PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for more than 25 years, empowering consumers and businesses in approximately 200 markets. The Sr Data Scientist, Fraud Risk Oversight will lead the development and implementation of advanced data science models and algorithms, collaborating with stakeholders to deliver solutions while ensuring data quality and mentoring junior scientists.
